hooks.command: bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; cd "$ROOT"; bun run engine/hooks/pre-edit-guard.ts'
bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; cd "$ROOT"; bun run engine/hooks/pre-bash-guard.ts'

bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; cd "$ROOT"; PAYLOAD=$(cat); echo "$PAYLOAD" | bun run engine/hooks/post-edit-debug-naming.ts; echo "$PAYLOAD" | bun run engine/hooks/post-edit-md-link.ts; echo "$PAYLOAD" | bun run engine/hooks/post-edit-format.ts'
bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; cd "$ROOT"; bun run plugins/notify/detect-events.ts 2>/dev/null || true'
